2 min read
Just now

--

The Elementor Partner Program helps freelancers and agencies move beyond one-time website projects by creating long-term client relationships and generating recurring revenue.
1. Turn One-Time Clients into Long-Term Partners
Instead of ending your relationship after a website launch, the Partner Program allows clients to own their Elementor subscriptions while you continue managing, maintaining, and growing their websites.
2. Earn Recurring Revenue
Partners can earn revenue from eligible Elementor products, including Elementor One, Editor Pro, Elementor Hosting, and Enterprise plans. Higher partner tiers also receive revenue from subscription renewals.
3. Manage Everything in One Place
The Partner Hub lets you manage client websites, licenses, subscriptions, and perform bulk actions from a single dashboard, making agency operations more efficient.
4. Exclusive Partner Benefits
As your partnership grows, you gain access to marketing opportunities, priority support, early access to new features, dedicated partner managers, and increased visibility within the Elementor ecosystem.
5. Built for Agency Growth
With powerful tools like Elementor One, V4, Angie AI, and Sticklight, agencies can build websites faster, streamline workflows, and deliver greater value to clients.
Final Thought
The Elementor Partner Program is more than a partnership — it’s a business growth strategy. By combining recurring revenue, client ownership, and powerful management tools, agencies and freelancers can build stronger relationships and create a more sustainable, scalable business.
